ORDER SHORTENING TIME RE: MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-22-2004 IN 206, APPELLANTS J. HERNANDEZ, G. HERNANDEZ, & C. RAMIREZ'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/3/05 IS CONTINUED TO 4/11/05 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/R. EDWARDS REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
